Data.Label: Emperor
Values: Gallius Rax (in effect, proclaimed himself Counselor to the Empire)

Data.Label: Events
Values: Ben Solo is born on Chandrila
The New Republic signs the Galactic Concordance with the Galactic Empire
Sabine Wren and Ahsoka Tano begin their search for Ezra Bridger
Leia Organa quits her Jedi training
